Story quest chain

An Unknown Threat

42 parts
StarterWeapon Factory
Systems9
Targets17
Rewards23

Chain Overview

StartWeapon Factory
SystemArrenius
Parts42
First questAn Unknown Threat: Part 1

Travel / deliver to AFIS HQ

Route & Targets

  • System: Arrenius
  • System: Kritillian
  • System: Hozar
  • System: Mitrilion
  • System: Vibrilian
  • System: Sarkinon
  • System: Durian
  • System: Neurona
  • System: Fulzar
  • Location: AFIS HQ in Arrenius
  • Location: Warp Gate in Kritillian
  • Location: Axalon in Hozar
  • Location: Eufelion in Hozar
  • Location: Melifon in Hozar
  • Location: Pirate Bay in Hozar
  • Location: Warp Gate in Mitrilion
  • Location: Orgasin in Mitrilion
  • Location: Armoji in Mitrilion
  • Location: Roskur in Mitrilion
  • Location: Warp Gate in Vibrilian
  • Location: Withered Roots in Vibrilian
  • Location: Hangar in Sarkinon
  • Location: Nezerian Research Base in Sarkinon
  • Location: Anchorhead Cantina in Durian
  • Location: Golgata III in Neurona
  • Location: Warp Gate in Arrenius
  • Location: New Erath in Fulzar
  • Location: AF Security Gate in Fulzar
  • Location: AF Recycle Station in Fulzar
  • Targets: Moth Queen lvl 18, Dread Queen lvl 68, Elite Fanatic lvl 11, Elite Fanatic lvl 12, Moth Alpha lvl 18, Moth Alpha lvl 13, Nezerian Fighter lvl 46, Nezerian Fighter lvl 66, Nezerian Battlecruiser lvl 48, Nezerian Battleship lvl 49, Aureus Warrior lvl 75, Aureus Monachus lvl 73, Aureus Sidus lvl 90, Aureus Judicator lvl 94, Executor
  • Items: Hydrogen Spill, Big Metal Scrap

Part 1: An Unknown Threat: Part 1

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1000-1200

Travel / deliver to AFIS HQ

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Start at Weapon Factory in Arrenius.
  2. Travel to AFIS HQ.
  3. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  4. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 2.

Description

Operative Smith: “Ah there you are, we have been expecting your arrival to Arenius.... we have ‘obtained’ a copy of one report, which you ‘supposedly’ presented to a Lieutenant Kreiger… regarding the destruction of Azuron... yes… we are somewhat impressed with your fairly rapid progress… you could potentially be of some minor use to us.. if.. you are interested… that is… go to the AFIS HQ… it located southwest of the main system here in Arrenius...”

Completion

AF Agent: “So you have decided to join our organisation? Good… welcome to the AFIS. We could definitely use more ‘competent’ agents. We have obtained several points of intel indicating that this new alien race have a major base of operations somewhere in the Gellan system. Your first task is to head over to the Gellan system and contact operative Smith for further information, he’s at the Warp Gate in Kritillian.“

Part 2: An Unknown Threat: Part 2

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1000-1200

Travel / deliver to Warp Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Warp Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 3.

Description

Meet Operative Smith at the Warp Gate in Kritillian.

Completion

Operative Smith: “Take a quick look around the most proximate area.. assess the strength of the hostiles… go… be useful”

Part 3: An Unknown Threat: Part 3

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Defeat 75 the quest targets in Kritillian

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Kritillian.
  2. Defeat 75 the required hostiles.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 4.

Description

Investigate the strength of the enemies in the area. Kill at least 75 enemies of various types.

Completion

Operative Smith: “Interesting data… this system is overrun by these bug like aliens… numerous but fairly weak... good… these bug like creatures have recently been starting to pour into the Arrenius system... they may potentially pose a threat. We should identify the source… and by we I mean you… get going… investigate the flower like structures“

Part 4: An Unknown Threat: Part 4

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypespawner
Level range0
RewardMission XP 2.5k Steel 1.2k

Defeat 25 the required spawners in Kritillian

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Kritillian.
  2. Defeat 25 the required spawners.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 5.

Description

Destroy 25 flower like structures orbiting planets in the Kritillian system.

Completion

Operative Smith: “Well done… very useful… they appear to shut down any hatching activity while taking damage… while useful knowledge... these structures are not the source they are merely incubators… the source must be elsewhere… if they are like their smaller counterparts back on Erath… maybe they have a queen… find and kill it… locating it might prove quite a challenge.. a good test of your resourcefulness”

Part 5: An Unknown Threat: Part 5

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP6k S2.5k A3x35

Defeat 1 Moth Queen lvl 18, Dread Queen lvl 68

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 1 Moth Queen lvl 18, Dread Queen lvl 68.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 6.

Description

Find and kill an insectoid queen somewhere in the Gellan Sector.

Completion

Operative Smith: “You are indeed quite skilled… not a wasted of time… make haste… return to the Warp Gate in Kritillian… I have uncovered some potentially valuable intel.”

Part 6: An Unknown Threat: Part 6

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to Warp Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Warp Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 7.

Description

Go to the Warp Gate in Kritillian.

Completion

Operative Smith: “Apart from the insectoids there are two sentient factions present in this area… they might be able to serve as a useful source of intel… the so called ‘Fanatics’ and the ‘Renegades’... lets flip coins on who get what… *flips a coin*... oh.. lucky… you get the Fanatics… go kidnap a Fanatic Pilot… and bring him to the AFIS HQ in Arrenius… for further processing”

Part 7: An Unknown Threat: Part 7

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 3k Steel 1k

Defeat 1 Elite Fanatic lvl 11, Elite Fanatic lvl 12 in Kritillian

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Kritillian.
  2. Defeat 1 Elite Fanatic lvl 11, Elite Fanatic lvl 12.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 8.

Description

Destroy a fighter belonging to the ‘Fanatics’ in Kritillian and capture the pilot.

Completion

Fanatics Pilot: “I will never tell you heathen scum anything!”

Part 8: An Unknown Threat: Part 8

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to AFIS HQ

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AFIS HQ.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 9.

Description

Bring the prisoner to the AFIS HQ in Arrenius.

Completion

AF Agent: “Here is your receipt for one prisoner, we will contact you with the results of the information retrieval services... hehe... oh and please do be careful the receipt will self-destruct in 30 seconds… hehe…”

Part 9: An Unknown Threat: Part 9

CategoryStory
Typepickup
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 3k Steel 3k

Collect 250 Hydrogen Spill

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 250 Hydrogen Spill.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 10.

Description

AF Agent: “This will take a while… so in the meantime… go gather 250 units of Hyrdogen Spill… because we need it… for something… which is of course… a secret… so just get to it… and don’t bother asking any questions...”

Completion

AF Agent: “Ok… thanks…”

Part 10: An Unknown Threat: Part 10

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 3k Steel 1k

Travel / deliver to AFIS HQ

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AFIS HQ.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 11.

Description

Return to AFIS HQ in Arrenius to receive any extracted intel.

Completion

AF Agent: “Bleh, I don’t want to have deal with those fanatics ever again… they are just completely nuts.. he wouldn’t stop talking about the golden gods and that they will soon return and annihilate all heathens… We were unable to get any useful information.”

Part 11: An Unknown Threat: Part 11

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 2400-2800

Travel / deliver to Warp Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Warp Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 12.

Description

Rendezvous with Operative Smith at the Warp Gate in Kritillian.

Completion

Operative Smith: “So the fanatics didn’t provide any useful information… that’s a shame… meanwhile... I did managed to get some intel from a Renegade.. they are currently engaged in hunting down a defector… it’s it vital that we find this defector before they do… this will be your highest priority… he was last seen warping to Hozar...”

Part 12: An Unknown Threat: Part 12

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 3k Steel 3k

Travel / deliver to Axalon, Eufelion, Melifon

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Axalon, Eufelion, Melifon.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 13.

Description

Go to Hozar and search for the Renegade Defector. *Hint: Investigate all planets*

Completion

Crew Member: There’s no sign of the Renegade Defector anywhere… maybe there’s a hidden station somewhere?

Part 13: An Unknown Threat: Part 13

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 4600

Travel / deliver to Pirate Bay

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Pirate Bay.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 14.

Description

Find the hidden station and inquire about any suspicious individuals…

Completion

Black Market Merchant: “I might have seen someone like that, a little favour might refresh my memory. These bloody giant space moths keeps eating my supply vessels, most frustrating. Why would they even want to eat a metal ship? Take down a few and I will assist you in turn.”

Part 14: An Unknown Threat: Part 14

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP3k S1.2 A2x35

Defeat 60 Moth Alpha lvl 18, Moth Alpha lvl 13 in Hozar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Hozar.
  2. Defeat 60 Moth Alpha lvl 18, Moth Alpha lvl 13.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 15.

Description

Assist the Black Market Merchant by killing 60 Moth Alphas in Hozar.

Completion

Black Market Merchant: “Thank you very very much! This will make my life a lot easier. I will keep my end of the bargain. The person you are looking for came past here a few days, I sold him a new ship and some replicated weapons. He was last seen warping to Mitrilion, he’s probably laying low on some planet there.”

Part 15: An Unknown Threat: Part 15

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1000-1200

Travel / deliver to Warp Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Warp Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 16.

Description

Rendezvous with Operative Smith at the Warp Gate in Mitrilion.

Completion

Operative Smith: “Ok... well done… getting to this miserable system… it’s completely overrun by insects… especially those suicidal explosive moths… who even came up with that idea...? anyway… enough about the local fauna... let’s split up and cover all the planets.. I head west… you head east… start with Armoji and Orgasin...”

Part 16: An Unknown Threat: Part 16

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP3k S1.2 A2x35

Travel / deliver to Orgasin, Armoji

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Orgasin, Armoji.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 17.

Description

Search for the Renegade Defector on Armoji and Orgasin in Mitrilion.

Completion

Operative Smith: “Nothing? I didn’t find anything in the west portion of the system… I was afraid of this… there are only two areas left... I’ll continue to the west… you’ll continue to the east and investigate the planet Roskur.. you may need some assistance this time… it looks really nasty on the scanners…”

Part 17: An Unknown Threat: Part 17

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP6k S1.5k A5x40

Travel / deliver to Roskur

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Roskur.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 18.

Description

Land on Roskur in Mitrilion and search for the Renegade Defector.

Crew: “This planet seems to be very heavily defended! We may need some assistance here”

Completion

Renegade Defector: “Who are you? How did you even find me here? I’m actually very impressed… I’m living in a small container in the middle of giant forest on a heavily defended alien planet in the middle of the insect infested Gellan sector… I thought people would take a hint that I maybe didn’t want to be found. So what do you want? You want information about the Nezerians? Sure… I’ll come with you, since you are going to have to find me a new hiding place, the Renegades don’t take very kindly to defectors.”

Part 18: An Unknown Threat: Part 18

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 2400-2800

Travel / deliver to AFIS HQ

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AFIS HQ.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 19.

Description

Bring the Renegade Defector to AFIS HQ in Arrenius.

Completion

Renegade Defector: “Here??? You think this place is safe? Not a chance!”

AF Agent: “This is probably the safest place in the galaxy… for some at least… hehe…”

Renegade Defector: “You clearly don’t know much… the Renegades will hunt me to the ends of the universe if they have to.. ”

AF Agent: “Ingrateful! We could just interrogate you… we’ll have you talking in minutes...”

Renegade Defector: “I’ll never talk… I would be dead either way”

Operative Smith: “Let’s not get hastily here… specify your terms…“

Renegade Defector: “Just find me a safe place to hide..”

Part 19: An Unknown Threat: Part 19

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 2400-2800

Travel / deliver to Warp Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Warp Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 20.

Description

Bring the Renegade Defector to the Warp Gate Vribrilian.

Completion

Operative Smith: “We have located a small plant far outside the main system… perhaps this will do? There’s absolutely nothing there.. except for bugs… it’s located at the coordinates x: 887, y: 220”

Renegade Defector: “Yes, bring me there alive… and I’ll tell you everything I know.”

Part 20: An Unknown Threat: Part 20

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP3.4k S1k A2x40

Travel / deliver to Withered Roots

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Withered Roots.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 21.

Description

Bring the Renegade Defector to the small planet located at the coordinates x: 887, y: 220 in Vibrilian.

Completion

Renegade Defector: “Thank you! I’m finally safe again. So, what do you want to know? You want to find the Nezerians? Why? Are you insane..?? Ok Ok… I’ll tell you everything I know. The Nezerians have an outpost in Sarkinon. We, the Renegades used to be the AF Black Ops Division. Only few hundreds of survived the massacre in Azuron. We will never forget what we saw that day. The Renegades are sworn to take revenge on the accursed Nezerians. To end their miserable existence and avenge all our fallen comrades. The difference in strength was just too great… we decided to give up anything in order to obtain power. But recently they have gone to far. I can’t put a blind eye to it any longer.. I didn’t mind the stealing… but the torture, the countless murders and the horrific experiments. Everything just to get a technological advantage against the damned Nezerians. There is one more thing you should know… the reason the Nezerians came to Azuron… it was not for us… slaughtering our fleets was just a pastime while they waited… for the golden ones...”

Part 21: An Unknown Threat: Part 21

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 2400-2800

Travel / deliver to Warp Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Warp Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 22.

Description

Rendezvous with Operative Smith at the Warp Gate in Vibrilion.

Completion

Operative Smith: “Excelent work… this turned out to be quite worth our time… I have a bad feeling about this… there was nothing but fear in his voice when he mentioned “the golden ones”... anyway we have more pressing problem… the Nezerians are in Sarkinon… that is too close for comfort.. we need to investigate this… find your way into Sarkinon and locate the Nezerian presence.”

Part 22: An Unknown Threat: Part 22

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 3k Steel 1k

Travel / deliver to Hangar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Hangar.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 23.

Description

Find the Nezerians in Sarkinon and Rendezvous with the AFIS at a convenient location in their vicinity.

Completion

Operative Smith: “This is bad… the Nezerians seems to have a very heavy presence in this region… and they are definitely very hostile… they ignore any attempt at communication and fire upon anything else at sight… we need to assess their combat potential... lookout.. we have incomings

Part 23: An Unknown Threat: Part 23

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP3.2k S1.2k A2x50

Defeat 15 Nezerian Fighter lvl 46, Nezerian Fighter lvl 66

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 15 Nezerian Fighter lvl 46, Nezerian Fighter lvl 66.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 24.

Description

Assess the Nezerians combat potential, take down 15 fighters.

Completion

Operative Smith: “Agile, and armed with high power plasters… luckily they are lacking in armor and shields… lets continue with the heavier ships…”

Part 24: An Unknown Threat: Part 24

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP3.2k S1.2k A2x50

Defeat 3 Nezerian Battlecruiser lvl 48

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 3 Nezerian Battlecruiser lvl 48.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 25.

Description

Assess the Nezerians combat potential, take down three Cruisers.

Completion

Operative Smith: “Very heavily armored… long range gatling gun… good weapons and armor… good quality equipment… but still… nothing exceptionally high tech...”

Part 25: An Unknown Threat: Part 25

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP4.2k S2k A2x55

Defeat 1 Nezerian Battleship lvl 49

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 1 Nezerian Battleship lvl 49.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 26.

Description

Assess the Nezerians combat potential, take down one Battleship.

Completion

Operative Smith: “Very heavily armored… heavy missiles… now those plasma torpedoes… that’s something new... acquiring the technology behind those would be a big achievement… anyway thats enough data… we can deal some damage to them… but it looks bad… they are still very strong… I doubt AF could put up much of a fight as it stands to today… fortunately.. I have a solution.. let’s kidnap a Nezerian Scientist… we have located a ‘nearly’ undefended Nezerian research facility…“

Part 26: An Unknown Threat: Part 26

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP4.6k S1.4k A2x60

Travel / deliver to Nezerian Research Base

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Nezerian Research Base.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 27.

Description

Kidnap an Nezerian Scientist from the Nezerian Research facility located at the coordinates x: -291 y: 683 in Sarkinon.

Completion

Nezerian Scientist: “Nahgreh zarreph ghaark! GHAARK! GHAARK!”

Part 27: An Unknown Threat: Part 27

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to AFIS HQ

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AFIS HQ.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 28.

Description

Return to AFIS HQ in Arrenius

Completion

Operative Smith: “Excellent… how ever there seems to be a bit of an issue here…”

Nezerian Scientist: “GHAARK!! Herath kraka zherphek!”

Operative Smith: “Oh do shut up! We need to find someone to help us translate their language… I leave this up to you...”

Part 28: An Unknown Threat: Part 28

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 2400-2800

Travel / deliver to Anchorhead Cantina

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Anchorhead Cantina.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 29.

Description

Crew: “Maybe we should locate Dr. Mira? She was able to translate the Nezerians logs last time.”

Look for Dr. Mira at the Anchorhead Cantina in Durian.

Completion

Bar Keeper: “Yeah, I remember her, she sure could handle her liquor. But she is not here any longer… she said something about a giant space brain… in some place called… what was it again.. oh right Neurona… if that’s even a real place”

Nezerian Scientist: “Uhay nuur bar!”

Bar Keeper: “Err… what? Who’s that guy?”

Nezerian Scientist: “GHAARK!!!”

Bar Keeper: “Ghaark to you too…. now either order something or… GET… LOST!"

Part 29: An Unknown Threat: Part 29

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP6.5k S3.4k A4x65

Travel / deliver to Golgata III

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Golgata III.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 30.

Description

Search for Dr. Mira, she should be on a planet somewhere in Neurona.

Completion

Dr. Mira: “What do you want? Can’t you tell I’m busy here? I’m trying to learn a moth-larva to speak our language!”

Nezerian Scientist: “Harga nuur zharg kraka zherphek zhur.”

Dr. Mira: “Fascinating!”

Nezerian Scientist: “Hur gak?”

Dr. Mira: “Ok… let’s go somewhere less hostile and talk. How about to the Anchorhead Cantina?”

Part 30: An Unknown Threat: Part 30

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 4600

Travel / deliver to AFIS HQ

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AFIS HQ.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 31.

Description

Return to AFIS HQ with the kidnapped Nezerian Scientist and Dr. Mira.

Nezerian Scientist: “Fharg gak kraka zhur...”

Dr. Mira: “Hmmm….”

Nezerian Scientist: “Gak?”

Completion

Dr. Mira: “I can use the previous data I obtained from the Dominator to translate.”

Nezerian Scientist: “GHAARK!!!”

Dr. Mira: “He said ‘HELP!!’”

Operative Smith: “Tell him… ‘No.’”

Dr. Mira: “Hurag hark”

Nezerian Scientist: “Fharg gak kraka zhur. Harga nuur zharg kraka zherphek zhur...”

Dr. Mira: “He said ‘Let me go, I don’t have time for this nonsense’”

Nezerian Scientist: “Hujarh nur kjajarh…. Kark!”

Dr. Mira: “You are insignificant… Worthless!”

*2 hours later

Operative Smith: “Yawn… he won’t say anything useful... all we’ve found is that they don’t know who we are… and they most certainly don’t care… they just see us as target practise… he seems to really fear something… something they refer to only as... the golden ones.. somewhere inside Fulzar… you should report our findings to Admiral Cheng in Arrenius… they need to know what to prepare for...”

Part 31: An Unknown Threat: Part 31

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 4600

Travel / deliver to Warp Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Warp Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 32.

Description

Report to Admiral Cheng in Arrenius.

Completion

Admiral Cheng: “This is terrible news and the timing couldn’t be much worse… except, I wonder who the golden ones are? Something even the Nezerians dread… That’s not a good sign. We have just launched a venture into Fulzar, in an attempt to find more habitable planets. I fear for the expeditions safety. Go to Fulzar! You must make haste… Contact Admiral Ymer in Fulzar. I will dispatch assistance as soon as possible.

Part 32: An Unknown Threat: Part 32

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 5.6k Steel 2.4k

Travel / deliver to New Erath

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to New Erath.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 33.

Description

Make your way to Fulzar and contact Admiral Ymer.

Completion

Admiral Ymer “Yes, the situation here is bad. Although not as bad as it could have been. The Nezerians and the Aureus, so called the ‘Golden Ones’ are too busy fighting each other to bother with us. Contact Operative Smith, I think he’s got a plan… and if I know him by now it will certainly involve a kidnapping”

Part 33: An Unknown Threat: Part 33

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 4600

Travel / deliver to AF Security Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AF Security Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 34.

Description

Find Operative Smith in Fulzar.

Completion

Operative Smith: “Ah there you are… I have a cunning plan… “

Crew Member: “Let me guess… you want us to kidnap an Aures Pilot?”

Operative Smith: “How did you know about my top secret plan?”

Crew Member: “It’s the same plan everytime!”

Operative Smith: “Hrrrmmm… let’s just get on with it…”

Part 34: An Unknown Threat: Part 34

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP9.6k S3.4k a2x80

Defeat 1 Aureus Warrior lvl 75, Aureus Monachus lvl 73

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 1 Aureus Warrior lvl 75, Aureus Monachus lvl 73.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 35.

Description

Destroy an Aureus Warrior or Monachus and kidnap the pilot!

Completion

Operative Smith: “What do you mean empty? No pilot? A drone ship? That’s too bad… guess we have to look to the bigger classes if we want to find a manned vessel… maybe an Aureus Sidus will do...”

Part 35: An Unknown Threat: Part 35

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP28k S5.8 A5x95

Defeat 1 Aureus Sidus lvl 90 in Fulzar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Fulzar.
  2. Defeat 1 Aureus Sidus lvl 90.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 36.

Description

Destroy an Aureus Sidus and kidnap the pilot!

Completion

Operative Smith: “What the??? It can split? And it’s also unmanned? Actually it’s not that much of a surprise… a pilot couldn’t survive that spinning... anyway it would be a shame to give up now… keep looking… next… go for an Aureus Judicator...“

Part 36: An Unknown Threat: Part 36

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP56k S14k A5x100

Defeat 1 Aureus Judicator lvl 94 in Fulzar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Fulzar.
  2. Defeat 1 Aureus Judicator lvl 94.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 37.

Description

Destroy an Aureus Judicator and kidnap the pilot!

Completion

Operative Smith: “Finally, we got one! Quick, let’s get out of here… before that giant ship comes after us.. head for the AFIS HQ in Arrenius.”

Part 37: An Unknown Threat: Part 37

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 16800

Travel / deliver to AFIS HQ

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AFIS HQ.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 38.

Description

Return to the AFIS HQ in Arrenius.

Completion

AF Agent: “Let’s get on with this…”

*The Aures Pilot has not made a single sound one the way here. It is wearing a full golden Body Armor.*

Operative Smith: “Who are you? You better speak up… or I might have to get nasty”

Dr. Mira: “Does it even know our language?”

AF Agent: “You have one last chance… what do your people want with us?”

Aures Pilot: “We Want You To Die.”

Dr. Mira: “How can you know our language??”

Aures Pilot: “The Languages Of Such Simple Life Forms Does Not Pose Much Of A Challenge.”

AF Agent: “You better be careful scum… realise your situation!”

Dr. Mira: “Why are you fighting everyone? If you are superior… shouldn’t you strive for galactic peace.”

Aures Pilot: “You Are A Statistical Anomaly Which Must Be Corrected For. Your Only Useful Function Is Your Ability To Die.”

Dr. Mira: “How rude...”

Operative Smith: “I have had enough!”

Aures Pilot: “My Brethren Have Arrived For Me.”

*The Aures Pilot fades away leaving only a weak golden mirage in his place.*

Operative Smith: “What a failure… hurry prepare for battle...”

Part 38: An Unknown Threat: Part 38

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 16800

Travel / deliver to Warp Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Warp Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 39.

Description

Operative Smith: “You survived??? That is at least some good news! It would have been a shame to lose such a useful tool. You better report everything to Admiral Cheng at the Warp Gate in Arrenius”

Completion

Admiral Cheng: “Good work, at least we know that negotiation with the Aureus is not an option. We should strike them now, they are clearly underestimating us. Maybe we can deal a decisive strike before they know what hit them... We need to prepare a massive strike force, this naturally requires a vast amount of resources and everyone will have to pitch in… collect 8000 pieces of large metal scraps and bring them to the AF Recycle Station in Fulzar.”

Part 39: An Unknown Threat: Part 39

CategoryStory
Typepickup
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP28k S3.6k A3x100

Collect 2000 Big Metal Scrap

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 2000 Big Metal Scrap.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 40.

Description

Collect 8000 pieces of Big Metal Scraps for the war effort!

Completion

Lieutenant Nguyen: “Take this reward as a token of appreciation for your assistance. Bring it to the resources to the recycle station in Fulzar.”

Part 40: An Unknown Threat: Part 40

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 8400-8600

Travel / deliver to AF Recycle Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AF Recycle Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 41.

Description

Bring the resources to the AF Recycle Station in Fulzar.

Completion

Lieutenant Nguyen: “That should be enough to finish our new Battleship class vessels. It’s time to strike the Aureus and take down their major force in the area; the Executor. When you are ready go talk to Admiral Ymer.”

Part 41: An Unknown Threat: Part 41

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 8400-8600

Travel / deliver to New Erath

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to New Erath.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock An Unknown Threat: Part 42.

Description

Talk to Admiral Ymer at New Erath in Fulzar when you are prepared to strike the Aurus Executor.

Completion

Admiral Ymer: “This is it! Let’s go to war! It’s now or never! This will be our best chance to destroy that monstrosity! Get ready to engage the Enemy! All ships: Forward!”

Part 42: An Unknown Threat: Part 42

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeboss
Level range0
RewardMission XP98k S68k 10x110

Defeat Executor

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat Executor.

Description

Join the assault and destroy the Aureus Executor!

Completion

Admiral Ymer: “I can’t believe it! You did it! You are a true hero! Although our losses where heavy, this is great news! We have finally been able to deal a real blow to them! Maybe the settlers of New Erath can finally feel safe.”

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
